locator.quote: only holds when commission is zero

text: The pre-fix lay-sizing formula equalises exposure, not P&L, once commission is non-zero; the equal-P&L derivation only holds at zero commission.
Under equal-exposure sizing, locked_pnl = min(win,lose) was systematically understated: the reward path saw the near-zero win-side cliff of an over-laid trade, not the true floor.
